visual_intent: soft steel-blue atmosphere with luminous white space
apricot warmth used only as a restrained signal color
brand_guardrails: do not use loud supplement ad colors or neon
avoid exaggerated energy or bodybuilder imagery
keep it minimal, intelligent, and premium
preserve clean text-safe areas for slide headlines
follow the latest Steel Light brand visual direction
match mood and restraint from the selected references without copying exact crop, pose, or object placement
composition: strong centered or slightly offset focal point
generous negative space with at least 40 percent breathing room
layered but simple depth with one foreground element maximum
text-first educational carousel with one key message per slide
cloud-white base with mist-blue atmosphere and restrained apricot accents
reference_strategy: Use the education-layout anchor for whitespace and editorial balance, then the cool-palette anchor for tonality and calm lighting.
variation_guardrails: do not repeat exact text placement from references

text_overlay.font_reference: Noto Sans JP Bold or closest available sans-serif
slides_ja: ミトコンドリアは細胞のエネルギーづくりを支える存在です。
年齢や生活習慣の影響で、働きがゆるやかになることがあります。
毎日のケアでは、整った生活習慣とやさしい継続が大切です。
難しく見えるテーマも、まずは基礎から知ることが第一歩です。
保存して、あとで見返せる基礎知識として活用してください。

negative_prompts: aggressive sales graphics or before/after framing
gym, bodybuilding, or athletic performance imagery
exact duplication of any reference crop, pose, object placement, or gradient pattern
reference_files: brand/references/business-context/strategy/Mitozz Japan Brand Voice And Messaging Guidelines.docx.pdf
notes: March 23 educational carousel. Use the selected references to keep the Steel Light palette, glow, and whitespace consistent while varying crop, camera distance, and exact object placement.
